title: Scene Timeline
description: Deterministic timing plan for the scene compositor. Maps every media artifact to absolute start/end positions in seconds. Produced by the timeline planner before compositing; no FFmpeg required.

duration_s.description: Scene duration in seconds: max(motion_duration_s, audio_timeline_end_s, ambient_duration_s).

sources.description: Paths to the sidecar artifacts consumed when building this timeline.

voice_line_sidecars.description: Paths to all voice-line sidecar JSONs consumed (narration + dialogue).

video_tracks.description: Video source tracks. For MVP this is a single motion MP4 spanning the full scene.

audio_tracks.description: Audio source tracks in deterministic playback order. Sequential narration/dialogue entries are followed by the ambient entry (which spans the full scene).

line_ref.description: segment_id or line_id from the script, or 'ambient' for the ambient track.

overlay_tracks.description: Overlay (PNG) tracks in compositing order. For MVP this is a single typography PNG spanning the full scene.
